title: gossypium peruvianum subsp. racemosum
intro: Gossypium peruvianum subsp. racemosum is a subspecies of the Gossypium peruvianum plant, commonly referred to as the wild cotton plant. This plant is used in traditional medicine and has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Gossypium peruvianum subsp. racemosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and provide protection against certain diseases. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to support skin health and immune function.
